name: MP7 | 森林 DDPAT
descriptionEn: Versatile but expensive, the German-made MP7 SMG is the perfect choice for high-impact close-range combat. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 非常好用，但价格昂贵，德国制造的 MP7 微型冲锋枪非常适合高强度的近距离作战。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
